allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const js = fs.readdirSync\('dist/assets'\).find\(f => f.startsWith\('index-'\) && f.endsWith\('.js'\)\); const content = fs.readFileSync\('dist/assets/' + js, 'utf8'\); const match = content.match\(/APP_VERSION.*?\([0-9]+\\.[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+\)/\); console.log\(match ? match[1] : 'not found'\)")
